title: Handmade Wooden Pestle Food Spice Grinding Stick Wood Mortar Pestle Bar Accessories and Cocktail Stick Tools Suitable for Home Kitchens and Bartenders
description:
About this item
✔ Practicality: It is very suitable for mashing and grinding, and can also be used as a cocktail bar tool.
✔Material: Made of natural wenge wood, which is produced in Southeast Asia and South America. The wood texture is clear and has a slight fragrance.
✔ Specifications: The length is about 6.42in/18cm, and the bottom diameter is about 1.25in/3.5cm. It weighs about 7 ounces/180g.
✔Replacement: This wooden pestle is light in weight and resistant to fall. It can replace the old or damaged stone pestle and stainless steel pestle.
✔Gifts: can be used as gifts for your family and friends.
reviews_5s: This pestle is well made, and has enough heft to make easy to use. It I major improvement over the marble pestle that I have used in the past.Easy to use to break apart garlic.Nice pestle. Wish it was more rounded at the bottom but it still works!Loved it use it for making baby food!It is perfectSolidly made, well finished. Works great!
reviews_1s: I'm returning it. I want my money back.
